parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body;

if (!body.clientId || !body.clientName) {
  throw new Error('clientId and clientName are required');
}

const esc = (val) => val && val.trim() ? "'" + val.trim().replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL';
const numOrNull = (val) => (val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== '') ? Number(val) : 'NULL';

const query = `INSERT INTO dr_smart.clients (
  sl_no, client_id, client_name, dr_name, specialisation,
  qualifications, years_of_experience, known_languages,
  location, city_name, country, primary_keyword, seo_keywords,
  whatsapp, contact_number, website_url,
  gmb_profile_link, gmb_profile_id, gmb_place_id, gmb_cid,
  fb_page_link, instagram_link, youtube_link,
  testimonial, gmb_audit_sheet, client_reporting_sheet, client_id_crm
) VALUES (
  ${numOrNull(body.slNo)},
  ${esc(body.clientId)},
  ${esc(body.clientName)},
  ${esc(body.drName)},
  ${esc(body.specialisation)},
  ${esc(body.qualifications)},
  ${numOrNull(body.yearsOfExperience)},
  ${esc(body.knownLanguages)},
  ${esc(body.location)},
  ${esc(body.cityName)},
  ${esc(body.country)},
  ${esc(body.primaryKeyword)},
  ${esc(body.seoKeywords)},
  ${esc(body.whatsapp)},
  ${esc(body.contactNumber)},
  ${esc(body.websiteUrl)},
  ${esc(body.gmbProfileLink)},
  ${esc(body.gmbProfileId)},
  ${esc(body.gmbPlaceId)},
  ${esc(body.gmbCid)},
  ${esc(body.fbPageLink)},
  ${esc(body.instagramLink)},
  ${esc(body.youtubeLink)},
  ${esc(body.testimonial)},
  ${esc(body.gmbAuditSheet)},
  ${esc(body.clientReportingSheet)},
  ${esc(body.clientIdCrm)}
) RETURNING id;`;

return [{ json: { query, clientName: body.clientName.trim() } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Client added successfully', clientId: $('Insert Client').first().json.id } }}

parameters.content: On Boarding or Deleting a Brand

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM dr_smart.gmb_weekly_audits WHERE TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = (SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM dr_smart.gmb_weekly_audits) ORDER BY created_at DESC;
=SELECT * FROM message_logs WHERE TO_CHAR(sent_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = '{{ $json.query.date }}' ORDER BY sent_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM dr_smart.gmb_rankings ORDER BY created_at DESC;
